meta-description: Learn about waiting periods for job-based coverage by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Waiting period (job-based coverage)
excerpt: The time that must pass before coverage can become effective for an employee or dependent who is otherwise eligible for coverage under a job-based health plan.
content: The time that must pass before coverage can become effective for an employee or dependent who is otherwise eligible for coverage under a job-based health plan.
